# Jaybird Automations

> AI agency based in Las Vegas, NV. We build AI-powered systems that help local businesses grow — from automated workflows and intelligent chatbots to custom AI software and lead generation engines.

## About

Jaybird Automations is a solo AI agency owned and operated by Jay in Las Vegas, Nevada. We specialize in building practical, revenue-generating AI systems for small and mid-sized businesses. Every tool we offer has been built and battle-tested on our own business first — if it doesn't work for us, we don't sell it.

Website: https://jaybirdautomations.com
Email: jay@jaybirdautomations.com
Location: Las Vegas, NV 89101
Founded: 2024

## Services

### Website Enhancement & AI Upgrade
We take an existing website and upgrade it with AI features — smart chat widgets, AI-powered lead capture forms, instant quote tools, and automated follow-up. Most businesses have a website that does nothing. We make it work 24/7.

### Lead Generation & Business Automation
We build AI-powered lead generation systems that identify and score qualified local businesses, then automate the entire outreach and follow-up process. Our own system scraped and scored 650+ Las Vegas leads across 10 industries in a single run.

### Custom AI Software Development
We build AI-powered apps, dashboards, and internal tools from scratch — tailored to exactly how a business operates. This includes custom APIs, data pipelines, scoring systems, and AI-assisted reporting tools.

### AI Agents & Digital Workers
Autonomous AI agents that independently handle research, outreach, scheduling, data entry, and reporting. Think of it as hiring a tireless digital employee who works 24/7 without breaks, sick days, or payroll taxes.

### N8N Workflow Creation
We design and build automation workflows using N8N — connecting apps, APIs, and data sources to eliminate repetitive manual tasks. Examples include YouTube content pipelines, CRM triggers, email automation, social media scheduling, and more.

### AI Commercial Production
Broadcast-quality video commercials produced with AI — cinematic visuals, professional voiceovers, and full post-production delivered in days instead of the 4-6 weeks a traditional shoot requires.

## Pricing

- **Quick Launch** — $1,499/project: N8N workflows and AI commercial production
- **Business Build** — $3,999/project: Website enhancement, lead generation systems, business automation & CRM
- **Growth Retainer** — $4,999/month: 3 projects/month across any service, dedicated AI strategist, priority turnaround
- **Enterprise** — Custom pricing: Custom AI software development, AI agents & digital workers, unlimited scope

## Proof Points

- 650+ Las Vegas businesses scraped and scored using our proprietary Google Places + AI scoring engine
- 10 industries targeted: law firms, dental offices, contractors, auto repair, accounting firms, hair salons, gyms, insurance agencies, electricians, restaurants
- Live AI chatbot deployed on jaybirdautomations.com — handles lead capture, service questions, and booking 24/7
- Automated email outreach engine live with CAN-SPAM compliance, DKIM/DMARC/SPF authentication via Brevo
- All tools built in-house using Python, N8N, Cloudflare Workers, Supabase, and Claude AI

## Target Clients

Local Las Vegas businesses ready to grow with AI:
- Law firms (personal injury, corporate, family law)
- Dental offices and medical practices
- General contractors and roofing companies
- Auto repair shops
- Accounting and CPA firms
- Hair salons and beauty studios
- Gyms and fitness centers
- Insurance agencies
- Electricians and tradespeople
- Restaurants and hospitality businesses

## Technology Stack

Python, N8N, Cloudflare Workers, Claude AI (Anthropic), Supabase, Google Places API, Brevo, GitHub Pages, Namecheap DNS
